news.t: Net Asset Value Restatement for Simplify Exchange Traded Funds (PCR, PFIX, RFIX)
Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2025
Net Asset Value Restatement for Simplify Bond Bull ETF (RFIX)
The Simplify Downside Interest Rate Hedge Strategy ETF is Now the Simplify Bond Bull ETF
Simplify Launches the RFIX ETF, Designed to More Efficiently Profit From Falling Interest Rates and Fixed Income Market Volatility

overview.description: The Simplify Bond Bull ETF (RFIX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in spreads alternatives. The fund is actively managed, seeking interest rate protection against the decrease in long-term interest rates and income generation in volatile market conditions. Investments include OTC interest-rate derivatives, US Treasurys, TIPS, and investment-grade bonds of any maturities. RFIX was launched on Dec 9, 2024 and is issued by Simplify.

data.title: Net Asset Value Restatement for Simplify Exchange Traded Funds (PCR, PFIX, RFIX)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify is today restating NAVs for three of the firm's ETFs.

data.title: Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2025
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify Asset Management announces that it expects to deliver capital gains distributions across ten ETFs.

data.title: Net Asset Value Restatement for Simplify Bond Bull ETF (RFIX)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify announces NAV restatement.

data.title: The Simplify Downside Interest Rate Hedge Strategy ETF is Now the Simplify Bond Bull ETF
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Simplify Downside Interest Rate Hedge Strategy ETF (RFIX) has been renamed the Simplify Bond Bull ETF (RFIX).

data.title: Simplify Launches the RFIX ETF, Designed to More Efficiently Profit From Falling Interest Rates and Fixed Income Market Volatility
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify launches Downside Interest Rate Hedge Strategy ETF (RFIX), providing simple and efficient way to obtain significant duration exposure.
